message:
Merge PR #2626: fix: gt prime --hook compact path too slow for non-Claude runtimes

Move compact/resume early-exit before setupPrimeSession and findAgentWork
to avoid Dolt queries and retries during compaction hooks. Keeps non-Claude
runtimes (e.g., Gemini CLI) under their short hook timeouts.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2626
Author: seanbearden
